title: Crystal Ball
scenario: Create a 5-year forecast for a company's sales revenue, including projected quarterly figures and a brief explanation of the underlying factors driving growth. The output should be a 120-word markdown table that can be copied and pasted into a business intelligence software.
constraints: Must include a brief explanation of the underlying factors driving growth

evaluationCriteria.description: The output should be correct Markdown syntax and can be copied and pasted into a business intelligence software.
The forecast should be based on realistic growth projections and underlying market trends.
The brief explanation should clearly convey the factors driving growth and any potential risks or challenges.
